LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PEGGY BURNHAM'S PETITION FOR ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IN CONFORMANCE THEREWITH IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE ARBITRATOR ISSUED A FINAL AWARD ON JULY 7, 2020. EFFICIENCY WOULD BE SERVED BY A PETITION SEEKING TO CONFIRM ALL OF THE ARBITRATOR'S SEVERAL AWARDS AT ONCE RATHER THAN PIECEMEAL. COUNSEL FOR THE RESPONDENT IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER, CLERK: S. LE, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
First Amended Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-29-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via CourtCall:
Mark Kenney, Esq. and Laszlo Ladi, Esq., 415-398-3344, appearing for Marina Galli, Defendant
Eric Saw, Esq., 415-536-2800, appearing for Peggy Burnham, Plaintiff

ARGUED. Mr. Kenny stated that he contested to the tentative ruling and argued that the court cannot overturn any part of the arbitrators award. Mr. Kenny presented his oral argument in support of his position and requested to be dismissed from this petition.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PEGGY BURNHAM First Amended Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award is GRANTED. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

First Amended Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-11-2020 Continued To Sep-29-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
The following matters were heard concurrently:
CPF-18-516400 Marina Galli VS. Pacific Union International Inc. and
CPF-20-517091 Peggy Conroy Burnham VS. Marina Galli.

APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Laszlo Ladi ll@severson.com for Petitioner/Respondent Marina Galli.
Alexander Weyand for Petitioner/Respondent Peggy Conroy Burnham.
Mark Chuang for Respondent Pacific Union International Inc.

Discussed (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PEGGY BURNHAM's First Amended Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award

Transferred to be heard in department 501 at 9:30 a.m. on September 29, 2020. That department handles all matters arising from the acquisition of real property per SF Local Rule 8.10(A)(1).

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award And Entry Of Judgment In Conformance Therewith
Off Calendar Jul-29-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Eric Shaw (415-269-4741; eric@shawesq.com) and Alex Weyand (415-536-2800; aweyand@wynlaw.com) of WEYAND LAW FIRM for Petitioner Peggy Burnham.
Mark J. Kenney (mjk@severson.com) and Laszlo Ladi (ll@severson.com) for Respondent Marina Galli.

ARGUED. Mr. Shaw requested a statement of decision and the Court state he will take a look at it. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PEGGY BURNHAM's Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award And Entry Of Judgment In Conformance Therewith is denied without prejudice. The arbitrator issued a final award on July 7, 2020. Efficiency would be served by a petition seeking to confirm all of the arbitrator's several awards at once rather than piecemeal.

Counsel for the respondent is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award And Entry Of Judgment In Conformance Therewith
Off Calendar Jun-15-2020 Continued To Jul-29-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
